description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a striking contrast between black and white exterior walls. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper level partially cantilevered over the lower level, creating a dynamic L-shaped footprint. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some rooms featuring wide, horizontal panes and others with more standard vertical windows. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no visible porch or overhang, emphasizing the minimalist aesthetic. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of painted concrete or stucco, glass, and metal framing.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, and large floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in a striking, minimalist design.
description_view_0: This view highlights the black facade with large windows on both floors and a simple entry door, showcasing the L-shaped structure.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a white exterior with multiple windows of varying sizes arranged in a mostly linear pattern.
description_view_2: The front view displays expansive glass panels and sliding doors on the lower level, emphasizing the open, modern design.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a predominantly black wall with fewer windows and a smaller, attached section with a single door and window.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no porch or overhang, and clean lines
